取综合值周期时间范围内（180），同一报告期同一机构只取最新预测营业利润，取综合值计算标记（中国A股盈利预测明细）为1，算数平均得到

Sharpe ratio = (interval average rate of return - risk-free rate of return converted to the day) / standard deviation, in which the risk-free rate of return converted to the day = (1 + risk-free rate of return) ^ (1 / 250) - 1, the risk-free rate of return is fixed for one year, and the interval range is nearly three years.
